programs.title: The Pitch
programs.description: After her retirement, Diana Matheson co-founded the first professional women's soccer league in Canada. This documentary follows two years of fighting against institutional skepticism: an inspiring story of resilience to change the rules of the game.

programs.title: MLS Soccer
programs.description: Toronto FC (3-4-5) travels to Bank of America Stadium to face Charlotte FC (4-6-3). Both clubs enter Matchday 14 separated by just one point in the Eastern Conference. Neither side is in peak form, making this a crucial game for playoff contention.

programs.title: MLS Soccer
programs.description: Real Salt Lake hosts Rocky Mountain Cup rival Colorado Rapids at America First Field. Real Salt Lake (22 pts) enters this match after scoring 20 goals through 11 games while the Rapids lean on leading scorer Rafael Navarro looking to carry momentum.
